questionHtml:
Calculate the standard enthalpy change, ΔH⦵, of the reaction. Use section 12 of the data booklet.

ΔHf⦵ ammonium nitrate = −366 kJ mol−1

ΔHf⦵ dinitrogen monoxide = 82 kJ mol−1
markschemeHtml:
2 x –285.8 «kJ mol−1» ✔


«1 mol (82 kJ mol−1) + 2 mol (– 285.8 kJ mol−1) – 1 mol (–366 kJ mol−1) =» –124 «kJ» ✔

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

meta.title: Calculate the standard enthalpy change, ΔH⦵, of the reaction. Use section 12 of the data booklet. ΔHf⦵ ammonium nitrate = −366 kJ mol−1 ΔHf⦵ dinitrogen monoxide = 82 kJ mol−1
